name: Prune Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400-450°F (200-230°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the shortening, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Add the egg to the mixture and beat until well combined.
4. Stir in the flour, salt, baking powder, and nutmeg.
5. Pour in the milk and mix until just combined.
6. Fold in the drained prunes.
7. Divide the batter evenly among greased or paper-lined muffin cups.
8. Bake for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
9. Allow the muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing them.
